name: Gate A (North Entrance)
description: Main entrance from North Parking lot. High accessibility.

name: Gate B (East Entrance)
description: Entrance adjacent to transit station. Highest flow rate.

name: Volunteer Operations & Help Center
description: Volunteer dispatch and spectator support services hub.

name: Multilingual Spectator Info Desk
description: Official tournament information desk with volunteers fluent in English, Spanish, French, and Portuguese.

name: Taco Goal
description: Authentic street tacos, nachos, and soft drinks.

name: Eco-Green Water Refill Station
description: Free filtered drinking water refill station. Bring your reusable bottle. Zero single-use plastic.

name: Concourse Recycling Hub
description: Compostable packaging sorting and waste segregation station.

name: Zero-Waste Sorting Hub
description: Smart recycling bins for food waste, plastics, paper, and general trash.

name: Main First Aid Station
description: Fully staffed medical bay for emergency care.

name: North Parking EV Charging Bay
description: Rapid electric vehicle charging stations located in North Lot.

name: East Transit Shuttle Terminal
description: Tournament shuttle terminal connecting to local metro and transit lines.

name: South Taxi & Rideshare Deck
description: Designated taxi rank and app-based rideshare staging zone.

name: West Gate Bicycle Valet
description: Secure monitored bicycle racks and electric scooter parking hub.

name: Accessibility Services & Assistance Hub
description: Wheelchair loaning, sensory room access, and helper escort dispatch center.
